headline: Robinhood Relists Algorand Raising Questions For Crypto Strategy And Valuation
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has relisted Algorand (ALGO) for U.S. retail traders. The move reverses earlier SEC-related crypto delistings that had restricted access to ALGO on the platform. Relisting ALGO marks a change in Robinhood’s approach to crypto listings and regulatory risk assessment. Robinhood has built its business around app based trading access for stocks, options, and a growing set of cryptocurrencies. By bringing ALGO back for U.S. retail users, the company is adjusting...

headline: JPMorgan flashes a red flag on Kalshi, Polymarket trading
summary: Wall Street has spent decades drawing bright lines around what counts as a bet versus an investment. Compliance manuals grew thick because the cost of getting that line wrong is jail time and seven-figure fines. Most of those manuals never imagined a 22-year-old in a Brooklyn coffee shop risking ...
